issue_summary: FileDeleteStrategy / FileCleaner FileDeleteStrategy is a strategy for handling file deletion and can be used as a calback in FileCleaner Together these allow FileCleaner to do a forceDelete to kill directories and provide hooks for secure delete
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Track the specified file, using the provided marker, deleting the file
     * when the marker instance is garbage collected.
     *
     * @param file   The file to be tracked.
     * @param marker The marker object used to track the file.
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Track the specified file, using the provided marker, deleting the file
     * when the marker instance is garbage collected.
     * The {@link FileDeleteStrategy#NORMAL normal} deletion strategy will be used.
     *
     * @param file  the file to be tracked, not null
     * @param marker  the marker object used to track the file, not null
     * @throws NullPointerException if the file is null
     */
